User.title: User Profile
User.description: Represents the user's personal profile and preferences in the finance tracker.

uid.description: The unique Firebase Auth user ID.

email.description: The email address of the user.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was initialized in the database.

monthlyBudget.description: Optional monthly spending limit/budget set by the user.

Transaction.title: Financial Transaction
Transaction.description: Represents a single income or expense transaction logged by the user.

type.description: The type of transaction: pemasukan (income) or pengeluaran (expense).

amount.description: The monetary value of the transaction.

category.description: The high-level category of the transaction (e.g., Makanan, Transportasi, Gaji).

subcategory.description: The specific sub-category (e.g., Makan Siang, Bensin, Gaji Pokok).

date.description: The date when the transaction occurred (formatted as YYYY-MM-DD).

description.description: Optional notes or details regarding the transaction.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the record was written to the database.

/users/{userId}/transactions/{transactio.description: Stores transaction logs for a specific user.
